zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Wilcock於1573年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾米費爾德時，她的父親Thomas Wilcock28歲，母親Jennet Fox24歲。她於1596年5月9日與Edward Wilson在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾米費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1621年5月19日在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾米費爾德享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Wilcock于1573年出生在英国英格兰越可爾米費爾德时，她的父亲Thomas Wilcock28岁，母亲Jennet Fox24岁。她于1596年5月9日与Edward Wilson在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾米費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1621年5月19日在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾米費爾德享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilcock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): from the Middle English personal name Wilcoc, a pet form of William (composed of the elements Will 1 + the hypocoristic suffix -cok; see Cocke ).

variants.name: Wilcockson
meanings: English (Derbyshire and Nottinghamshire): patronymic meaning ‘son of   Wilcock  ’.

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

variants.name: Wilcott
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): habitational name from Willicote in Clifford Chambers (Gloucestershire). The placename derives from Old English wilig ‘willow’ + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’. In some cases perhaps an altered form of Wilcock .

variants.name: Wilcox
meanings: English (Yorkshire, Lancashire, and Flintshire): variant of Wilcock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This form of the surname is based on the pronunciation.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Wilcock was born in 1573, in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Wilcock, was 28 and her mother, Jennet Fox, was 24. She married Edward Wilson on 9 May 1596, in Mirfield, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 19 May 1621, in Mirfield, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Wilcock est née en 1573, à Mirfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Wilcock, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Jennet Fox, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Wilson le 9 mai 1596, à Mirfield, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 mai 1621, à Mirfield, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Wilcockが1573年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアミルフィールドで生まれた時，父Thomas Wilcockは28歳，母Jennet Foxは24歳であった。1596年5月9日にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアミルフィールドでEdward Wilsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1621年5月19日にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアミルフィールドで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Wilcock(이)가 1573년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 미르필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wilcock(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jennet Fox(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1596년 5월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 미르필드에서 Edward Wilson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1621년 5월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 미르필드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Wilcock родилась в 1573 г. в местности мирфиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Wilcock было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Jennet Fox, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Wilson 9 мая 1596 г. в местности мирфиелд, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 19 мая 1621 г. в местности мирфиелд, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
